# title

**Instance Property**

The title for the system to display with the preview.

## Declaration

```swift
var title: String { get set }
```

## Inspecting a preview reply

- **attachments**: The attachments for a preview reply that provide additional data for the system to display the preview.
- **stringEncoding**
